title: selliguea elmeri
intro: Selliguea elmeri, also known as the Elmer's shield fern, is a species of fern native to the Philippines. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Selliguea elmeri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a promising natural remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, Selliguea elmeri is often used in traditional medicine to make teas, infusions, and topical applications, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
